title: NodeInfo Content-Type missing profile parameter
description: GET /nodeinfo/2.0 returns Content-Type: application/json. The NodeInfo 2.0 spec recommends Content-Type: application/json; profile="http://nodeinfo.diaspora.software/ns/schema/2.0#" per the discovery document. Some clients check for this. Discovered during conformance testing.
close_reason: NodeInfo now returns Content-Type with profile parameter per NodeInfo 2.0 spec
